name: Pineapple Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat eggs, salad oil, sugar, and vanilla until well mixed.
2. Stir in zucchini and pineapple.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, baking soda, salt, baking powder, and cinnamon.
4. Mix dry ingredients into zucchini mixture until just blended. Add nuts and raisins.
5. Pour batter into two greased and floured baking pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for one hour or until a toothpick comes out clean.
